summary: Fix the "No compose hierarchies found" error by downgrading the `androidx.test:rules` dependency to the last major stable version (1.5.0). This resolves an instability in the pre-release version of the test rule library while keeping the necessary Espresso updates to prevent the original InputManager crash.
